sub_modules.conv2d_valid_gen: Combinational valid-window generator. It asserts when the incoming raster coordinate has reached the convolution radius in both row and column dimensions.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_pad: Combinational zero-padding mask for the sliding stencil window. Invalid top/left border taps are forced to zero.
sub_modules.conv2d_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient source. The default implementation generates binomial Gaussian-style kernels for 3x3, 5x5, and 7x7 configurations.
sub_modules.conv2d_dot_product: Combinational matrix-vector dot-product datapath. It multiplies the flattened stencil window by the flattened coefficient matrix and accumulates into an extended signed result.
sub_modules.conv2d_output_saturate: Combinational output-width limiter. It clamps negative accumulated values to zero and saturates positive overflow to the output maximum.
